title: Minecraft Bedrock Shadow Settings 1.21.80
description: Shadow stylization settings for Vibrant Visuals. Controls whether shadows are blocky or soft.

format_version.description: The 3-part schema version for parsing these shadow settings.

minecraft:shadow_settings.description: The root object containing shadow stylization settings.

shadow_style.description: The type of shadows to use. Blocky shadows are pixelated and snapped to the texel grid. Soft shadows have a smooth falloff on edges.

texel_size.description: The resolution in texels to which shadows will be quantized. Recommended to use the same resolution as block texture assets (e.g. 16 for 16x16px textures).
